name: Duke Energy Corporation Depositary Shares each representing a 1/1000th interest in a share of 5.75% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: Duke Energy Corporation is an energy company that operates through electric utilities and infrastructure and gas utilities and infrastructure segments. The company supplies electricity and natural gas to customers in the Southeast and Midwest regions of the United States. Duke Energy is headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina.
